message:
fix: address round 3 reviewer A issues across 6 areas

- loadFromDisk() now clears agents map before loading (prevents stale
  entries surviving reloads)
- rollback() and rollbackCommit() re-sync in-memory state via
  loadFromDisk() after git revert
- addAgent() uses max of root and overlay versions as base (prevents
  version regression when overlay already exists)
- Rollback test now verifies original instance's in-memory state
- removeAgent test uses async rejects pattern instead of sync toThrow
- syncRoot manifest comparison uses stable key ordering to avoid
  spurious commits from non-deterministic readdir order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
